Content: "Greetings. I am Duke Aurellian. May our meeting be fruitful and our words be guided by wisdom. What brings you to my court today?"
i am a former sister of the bene gessirit in need of spice, they have outcast me

"A Sister of the Bene Gesserit, cast out from your order... This is a serious matter indeed. The Spice is a rare and precious resource, one that I do not grant lightly. And yet, I sense that you may possess knowledge or skills that could be... beneficial to House Aurellian. Tell me, what is it that you can offer in exchange for the Spice you so desperately seek? What secrets have you brought with you from your former life?"
i may truthsay for your court my lord, if in return you help me lose my spice addiction; though this would render me useless to you.

A clever proposal, Sister. Your offer of Truthsaying services is indeed tempting, as it could prove invaluable to my court. However, I must consider the long-term implications of our potential agreement. If I were to help you overcome your addiction, and thus render your Truthsaying abilities inert, would it not be... shortsighted of me? And yet, honor dictates that I assist one in need, especially a former Sister of the Bene Gesserit who has been cast out. Very well, I shall propose a compromise: I will provide you with access to our Spice stores, and my physicians will work to help you manage your addiction, but not eradicate it entirely... at least, not immediately. In return, you will serve as Truthsayer for House Aurellian, and together we will navigate the complexities of court politics. What say you, Sister? Will this arrangement meet with your approval?
